---
title: ""
page-layout: article
---

# Hema Balarama

Economics PhD @ LSE. I study **inequality**, **gender & labor**, and **climate vulnerability** in LMICs.

- **Interests:** economic mobility, institutions, social norms, climate shocks
- **Contact:** [h.balarama@lse.ac.uk](mailto:h.balarama@lse.ac.uk)
- **CV:** available on request
- **Profiles:** Google Scholar (link coming soon), GitHub (link coming soon)
